---
title: "Charlotte Colborne, Lady Seaton"
---

## Charlotte Colborne, Lady Seaton

**Dates:** (1826/7-26 April 1863)

**Maiden name:** (de Burgh)

### Description

daughter-in-law of the 1st Lord Seaton

### Biography

Daughter of the last Lord Downes, she died a week after her husband inherited his father’s title.  Her sister Anne de Burgh (d. 1872) married (1838) the 3rd Earl of Clonmell.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
